all.en: Seven-year-old Tommy stared at his math worksheet with a confused expression.
all.zh: 七歲的湯米一臉困惑地盯著他的數學作業單。

all.en: His older sister Vivian was busy texting her friends on the sofa nearby.
all.zh: 他的姊姊薇薇安在旁邊沙發上忙著傳訊息給朋友。

all.en: "Vivian, can you help me? I don't understand these problems," Tommy asked sadly.
all.zh: 「薇薇安，妳可以幫我嗎？我不懂這些題目，」湯米難過地問。

all.en: Vivian sighed loudly, but she put down her phone and came over to the table.
all.zh: 薇薇安大聲嘆氣，但還是放下手機走到桌邊。

all.en: She looked at the problem about adding fractions and remembered how she once struggled too.
all.zh: 她看著那道分數加法題，想起自己以前也曾經苦惱過。

all.en: "Okay, imagine you have a pizza cut into eight slices," she began patiently.
all.zh: 「好，想像你有一個切成八片的披薩，」她耐心地開始解釋。

all.en: Tommy's eyes lit up because pizza was his favorite food in the world.
all.zh: 湯米的眼睛亮了起來，因為披薩是他全世界最愛吃的東西。

all.en: Vivian drew a circle and divided it into pieces, just like their teacher would.
all.zh: 薇薇安畫了一個圓圈並分成幾片，就像他們老師會做的那樣。

all.en: After twenty minutes, Tommy was finishing problems on his own and smiling proudly.
all.zh: 二十分鐘後，湯米已經能獨自完成題目，自豪地笑著。

all.en: He gave Vivian a big hug and said she explained things better than his teacher.
all.zh: 他給了薇薇安一個大大的擁抱，說她解釋得比老師還要好。

all.en: Mom watched from the kitchen and felt warm seeing her children getting along.
all.zh: 媽媽從廚房看著，看到孩子們相處融洽，心裡感到很溫暖。

all.en: Vivian secretly admitted that helping her brother made her feel pretty smart too.
all.zh: 薇薇安私下承認，幫弟弟做功課其實也讓她覺得自己滿聰明的。

all.en: From that day on, Tommy asked Vivian for help whenever his homework felt too difficult.
all.zh: 從那天起，每當功課太難，湯米就會找薇薇安幫忙。

all.en: Vivian discovered that explaining things to him actually helped her remember her own lessons.
all.zh: 薇薇安發現，把東西講給弟弟聽其實也幫助她記住自己學過的東西。

all.en: She decided to set aside thirty minutes every evening just for their study time together.
all.zh: 她決定每晚撥出三十分鐘專門用來陪弟弟一起讀書。

all.en: Mom started leaving small snacks on the table to keep them focused and happy.
all.zh: 媽媽開始在桌上放一些小點心，讓他們專心又開心。

all.en: Tommy's grades on his next math test improved from a low score to nearly perfect.
all.zh: 湯米下一次數學考試的成績從低分進步到接近滿分。

all.en: His teacher wrote a note praising his sudden progress and asked what had changed at home.
all.zh: 老師寫了張字條稱讚他突然的進步，問家裡發生了什麼變化。

all.en: Vivian felt proud and even started thinking she might want to become a teacher one day.
all.zh: 薇薇安感到驕傲，甚至開始想著也許有一天自己想當老師。

all.en: On weekends, the siblings sometimes solved tricky puzzles together just for fun.
all.zh: 週末時，姊弟倆有時會一起解一些難題，純粹覺得好玩。

all.en: Their bond grew stronger, and they argued far less than they used to.
all.zh: 他們的感情越來越好，吵架的次數比以前少了許多。

all.en: Mom often joked that the math worksheet had been the start of a beautiful partnership.
all.zh: 媽媽常開玩笑說，那張數學作業單是這段美好搭檔關係的起點。

all.en: One spring afternoon, Vivian noticed that Tommy was suddenly struggling with reading instead of math.
all.zh: 某個春天的午後，薇薇安發覺湯米突然不是數學有困難，而是閱讀。

all.en: He sighed at long paragraphs and often gave up before reaching the second page.
all.zh: 他看到長段落就嘆氣，常常還沒讀到第二頁就放棄。

all.en: Vivian decided to read aloud with him every night for fifteen minutes after dinner.
all.zh: 薇薇安決定每天晚餐後跟他一起朗讀十五分鐘。

all.en: They started with short adventure books that had colorful pictures on every other page.
all.zh: 他們從附有彩色插圖的短篇冒險故事書開始讀。

all.en: Tommy's confidence grew quickly, and soon he was choosing his own books at the library.
all.zh: 湯米的信心很快增加，沒多久就能自己在圖書館挑書了。

all.en: Mom recorded a short video of the siblings reading together and sent it to their grandparents.
all.zh: 媽媽錄了一段姊弟一起讀書的短片，傳給爺爺奶奶看。

all.en: Grandpa replied with a long voice message, praising both children for their patience and effort.
all.zh: 爺爺回了一段長長的語音訊息，稱讚兩個孩子的耐心與努力。

all.en: For Tommy's birthday, Vivian gave him a hardcover novel with a personal note on the first page.
all.zh: 湯米生日時，薇薇安送了他一本精裝小說，並在第一頁寫了私人留言。

all.en: The note said that no matter how busy she became, she would always have time to read with him.
all.zh: 留言寫著無論她以後多忙，永遠都會抽出時間陪他一起讀書。

all.en: Tommy hugged the book tightly and decided it would always sit on the very top of his shelf.
all.zh: 湯米緊緊抱著那本書，決定永遠把它放在書架最上面的位置。

all.en: As the school year continued, Vivian and Tommy developed their own evening reading routine.
all.zh: 學年持續進行的同時，薇薇安和湯米建立起屬於自己的晚間閱讀習慣。

all.en: They started a small notebook where they wrote down interesting words and short reactions to each book.
all.zh: 他們準備了一本小筆記本，記下有趣的單字和對每本書的簡短感想。

all.en: Mom occasionally joined them and recommended classic stories from her own childhood collection.
all.zh: 媽媽偶爾會加入，推薦她童年收藏的經典故事。

all.en: Tommy began writing his own short adventure tales, inspired by the books they had read together.
all.zh: 湯米開始自己寫短篇冒險故事，靈感都來自他們一起讀過的書。

all.en: Vivian gently corrected his spelling and praised every clever idea that appeared in his stories.
all.zh: 薇薇安溫柔地幫他訂正拼字，並對他故事裡每個聰明的點子給予稱讚。

all.en: His teacher displayed one of his stories on the classroom wall during the school open-house event.
all.zh: 學校開放日活動時，老師把他其中一篇故事貼在教室的牆上展示。

all.en: Grandpa sent another long voice message after seeing the story, calling Tommy a true young author.
all.zh: 爺爺看了故事後又傳來一段長語音，稱讚湯米是真正的小作家。

all.en: Vivian decided to volunteer as a reading helper for younger children at the public library.
all.zh: 薇薇安決定到公立圖書館當志工，協助比較小的孩子閱讀。

all.en: Tommy went with her on Saturdays and proudly introduced his sister as his very first teacher.
all.zh: 湯米週六會跟她一起去，驕傲地把姐姐介紹為自己最早的老師。

all.en: Mom often said that one small math worksheet had quietly built a lifetime of shared learning.
all.zh: 媽媽常說，當年一張小小的數學作業單，悄悄建立起他們一輩子的共學情誼。

all.en: By the end of the year, Tommy had written a small collection of seven short adventure stories.
all.zh: 到那年年底，湯米已經寫了一本由七篇短篇冒險故事組成的小集子。

all.en: Vivian helped him bind the stories together using ribbon, glue, and a colorful hand-drawn cover.
all.zh: 薇薇安幫他用緞帶、膠水和一張彩色手繪封面把這些故事裝訂成冊。

all.en: Mom photocopied the booklet and gave one to each grandparent as a quiet holiday surprise.
all.zh: 媽媽把這本小書影印幾份，悄悄地當作節日驚喜送給每位爺爺奶奶。

all.en: Grandpa called to say he had read every story twice before going to bed each evening.
all.zh: 爺爺打電話來說，他每天睡前都會把每篇故事讀過兩遍。

all.en: Vivian started keeping a separate notebook where she recorded teaching tips from her library volunteering.
all.zh: 薇薇安開始準備另一本筆記本，記下她在圖書館做志工時學到的教學心得。

all.en: She noticed that gentle patience worked far better than strict correction with younger children.
all.zh: 她發現對年紀較小的孩子來說，溫柔的耐心遠比嚴格的糾正來得有效。

all.en: Tommy proudly told his classmates that his sister was helping kids read all across their neighborhood.
all.zh: 湯米驕傲地告訴同學，他姊姊正在幫整個社區的孩子學閱讀。

all.en: During spring break, the siblings visited a small bookstore and chose five new titles to share.
all.zh: 春假期間，姊弟倆去了一家小書店，挑了五本新書一起分享。

all.en: Mom secretly slipped a thank-you card into Vivian's bag for being such a patient and loving sister.
all.zh: 媽媽偷偷在薇薇安的書包裡塞了一張感謝卡，謝謝她當這麼有耐心又有愛的姊姊。

all.en: That night, the family agreed that reading aloud together would remain a permanent part of their evenings.
all.zh: 那天晚上，全家人一致同意一起朗讀將永遠成為他們夜晚不可缺少的一部分。

all.en: The siblings began reading every Tuesday and Thursday evening, no matter how busy the school day had been.
all.zh: 兄妹倆開始每週二和週四晚上一起讀書，不論當天學校有多忙。

all.en: Tommy chose his own books at the library, growing more confident with every chapter he completed alone.
all.zh: 湯米在圖書館自己挑書，每讀完一章就更有自信一些。

all.en: Vivian started a small reading club at school, where older students read aloud to younger classmates.
all.zh: 薇薇安在學校發起了一個小型閱讀社，由高年級學生為低年級的同學朗讀。

all.en: The club grew quickly, and the principal offered a quiet corner of the library as their official base.
all.zh: 閱讀社很快壯大，校長把圖書館的一個安靜角落正式撥給他們當基地。

all.en: Mom donated a small bookshelf and filled it with picture books from her own childhood years.
all.zh: 媽媽捐了一個小書架，並用她童年時期的繪本把它填滿。

all.en: Dad built a tiny reading lamp shaped like a smiling moon, hanging it above the corner for warm lighting.
all.zh: 爸爸做了一盞像微笑月亮的小型閱讀燈，把它掛在角落上方提供溫暖照明。

all.en: Tommy proudly volunteered to read to the youngest kindergarteners every Friday during morning recess.
all.zh: 湯米驕傲地自願在每週五上午的下課時間為最小的幼稚園學童朗讀。

all.en: His teacher praised his patient voice and his careful pauses for every difficult question the children asked.
all.zh: 老師稱讚他朗讀時聲音耐心，對孩子提出的每個難題都會耐心停下來回應。

all.en: By the end of the year, the family donated forty books to local kindergartens through Vivian's club.
all.zh: 到了學年末，全家透過薇薇安的閱讀社捐了四十本書給當地的幼稚園。

all.en: Mom realized her quiet evening homework sessions had quietly grown into a small community of young readers.
all.zh: 媽媽發現他們安靜的晚間作業時光，已悄悄成長為一個小小的兒童閱讀社群。

all.en: During summer vacation, Vivian and Tommy planned a special reading camp for children in their neighborhood.
all.zh: 暑假期間，薇薇安和湯米為社區裡的孩子規劃了一場特別的閱讀營。

all.en: They borrowed picture books from the school library and set up cozy reading mats under the garden trees.
all.zh: 他們從學校圖書館借了繪本，並在花園樹下鋪上舒適的閱讀墊。

all.en: Eight neighborhood children signed up, ranging from four to nine years old with varied reading levels.
all.zh: 鄰里有八個孩子報名，年齡從四歲到九歲，閱讀程度也各不相同。

all.en: Vivian split the group into smaller pairs so every child received personal attention during each session.
all.zh: 薇薇安把孩子分成小組配對，讓每個小朋友在每次活動都能得到個別的關注。

all.en: Tommy demonstrated how to use voices for different characters, making every story feel like a small play.
all.zh: 湯米示範如何為不同角色配上不同聲音，讓每個故事都像一齣小戲。

all.en: Mom prepared healthy fruit snacks each afternoon to keep the young readers fueled and cheerful.
all.zh: 媽媽每天下午準備健康的水果點心，讓這些小讀者既有體力又開心。

all.en: By the second week, even the shyest child was raising his hand eagerly to read a paragraph aloud.
all.zh: 到了第二週，連最害羞的孩子也熱切地舉手，想朗讀一段給大家聽。

all.en: Several parents thanked Vivian personally, saying their kids now begged to visit the library every weekend.
all.zh: 好幾位家長親自向薇薇安道謝，說他們的孩子現在每個週末都吵著要去圖書館。

all.en: At the camp's closing ceremony, each child received a handmade certificate decorated by Tommy himself.
all.zh: 閱讀營結業典禮上，每個孩子都收到一張湯米親手裝飾的手作獎狀。

all.en: Vivian quietly realized that the math worksheet years ago had set her on the path to becoming a real teacher.
all.zh: 薇薇安靜靜體會到，多年前那張數學作業單，已悄悄把她引上了成為真正老師的道路。

all.en: In the autumn, Vivian was invited to share her reading camp experience at a regional youth conference.
all.zh: 秋天時，薇薇安受邀在一場區域性的青年會議上分享她舉辦閱讀營的經驗。

all.en: She prepared a short slideshow filled with photos of Tommy reading to wide-eyed kindergarten children.
all.zh: 她準備了一段簡短的投影片，裡面全是湯米為睜大眼睛的幼稚園孩子朗讀的照片。

all.en: Tommy traveled with her and helped distribute small handouts to teachers attending the morning session.
all.zh: 湯米和她一起前往，幫忙在早場時間發放給與會老師的小型講義。

all.en: Several teachers asked Vivian whether she would visit their schools to start similar reading partnerships.
all.zh: 好幾位老師詢問薇薇安是否願意到他們的學校，協助建立類似的閱讀夥伴計畫。

all.en: Mom helped her create a simple step-by-step guide so any sibling pair could begin reading together at home.
all.zh: 媽媽幫她製作了一份簡單的步驟指南，讓任何手足都能在家裡開始一起朗讀。

all.en: Within months, twelve schools had launched their own reading partnerships using Vivian's gentle approach.
all.zh: 幾個月內，已經有十二所學校採用薇薇安的溫柔方法，啟動了自己的閱讀夥伴計畫。

all.en: Tommy received letters from young readers who had benefited from his stories, each one decorated with stickers.
all.zh: 湯米收到許多受惠於他故事的小讀者來信，每一封都貼滿了貼紙。

all.en: He kept every letter in a special wooden box that Dad had built for his growing collection of memories.
all.zh: 他把每封信都收在爸爸特地為他不斷增加的回憶所做的木盒裡。

all.en: Vivian decided to apply for a small education scholarship to continue her studies after high school graduation.
all.zh: 薇薇安決定申請一份小額的教育獎學金，作為她高中畢業後繼續升學的資金。

all.en: That evening, the family sat together quietly, knowing one shared homework session had reshaped all of their futures.
all.zh: 那晚，全家靜靜地坐在一起，明白當年那一次共寫作業的時光已悄悄改變了他們所有人的未來。

all.en: The following Monday, Tommy bought himself a small ring binder to organize all the thank-you letters from his young readers.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一，湯米幫自己買了一個小型活頁夾，整理小讀者們寄來的所有感謝信。

all.en: Vivian opened her acceptance letter to her dream university one rainy Saturday morning, and Tommy quietly handed her a tissue.
all.zh: 某個下著雨的星期六早上，薇薇安拆開夢想中大學的錄取通知，湯米默默遞了張面紙給她。

all.en: Mom framed both the math worksheet and the university acceptance letter, hanging them side by side in the living room hallway.
all.zh: 媽媽把當年那張數學作業單和大學錄取通知都裱框，並排掛在客廳的走廊上。

all.en: Dad joked that the hallway had become a tiny family museum, and the children pretended to charge him an admission fee.
all.zh: 爸爸開玩笑說走廊變成了家庭小博物館，孩子們還假裝向他收門票。

all.en: Tommy started writing a short story collection in the same notebook style he had used during their first reading sessions together.
all.zh: 湯米開始用他們最初一起閱讀時的同款筆記本寫一本短篇故事集。

all.en: Vivian moved into a small student dormitory and propped Tommy's first hand-bound booklet on her new desk for daily encouragement.
all.zh: 薇薇安搬進一間小小的學生宿舍，把湯米第一本手工裝訂的小書立在新書桌上，每天提醒自己。

all.en: Tommy missed his sister so much during her first week away that he secretly slept with one of her old hoodies for comfort.
all.zh: 薇薇安離家的第一週，湯米想她想到偷偷穿著她的舊連帽外套睡覺。

all.en: Every Sunday evening, they read aloud to each other over a video call, with Mom occasionally peeking in to listen quietly.
all.zh: 每個星期日傍晚，他們會透過視訊輪流朗讀給對方聽，媽媽偶爾會悄悄探頭進來聆聽。

all.en: Tommy's teacher pinned one of his new short stories to the classroom wall, and three classmates asked if they could borrow the original notebook.
all.zh: 湯米的老師把他的一篇新故事貼在教室牆上，三位同學問能不能借閱原稿筆記本。

all.en: Before bed each night, Tommy whispered a quiet thank-you to that very first homework moment, knowing it had quietly shaped his entire childhood.
all.zh: 每晚睡前，湯米都對著最初的那次寫功課時光輕聲說聲謝謝，明白它已悄悄塑造了他整個童年。
